html:
Exclusive to:  

The Scaled Chest is a craftable container in the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype, and costs 1 Scale, 4 Boards, and 10 Gold Nuggets to craft. Unlike the regular Chest, the Scaled Chest is fireproof and has 12 slots, as opposed to the normal Chest's 9 slots.

Items can be stored in a Scaled Chest by dragging them onto it or by opening the Chest to place them in specific slots. Chests help keep items better organized than by dropping them on the ground. Note that there are four Mobs in the game that can steal from, or knock items out of, chests; Splumonkeys, Krampus, Slurtles, and Bearger.

Downloadable Content

In the Hamlet DLC, the Scaled Chest crafting recipe is unavailable, however, a Blueprint for it can be bought with 200 Oincs from The Tinkerer's Tower. The Scales are available at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium. Additionally, the Scaled Chest can be opened by Pogs.

Tips

  • While Scaled Chests may seem desirable for a hot Summer, due to the risk of spontaneous combustion and the Dragonfly's natural vandalism for Ashes, it is probably best to use Scales to craft Scalemail first, since the Dragonfly becomes much easier to fight after Scalemail is acquired, and in later Summers, the player may have enough gold to mass-produce Scaled Chests.
  • The same functionality can be achieved with Piggybacks, with the only drawback being that players have to constantly equip and unequip the Piggybacks to check the items inside of them.

Gallery

  • Scaled Chests with Wolfgang for scale.
Craftable ItemsStructures

"dragonflychest"
“Next best thing to a lockbox!”
–Wilson
“I'm not sure why you'd want something that DOESN'T burn...”
–Willow
“Chest is not afraid of fire.”
–Wolfgang
“Boom box.”
–Wendy
“CAN HANDLE EXTREMELY HIGH TEMPERATURES”
–WX-78
“Scales! Scales are the winner!”
–Wickerbottom
“Gaudy if you ask me.”
–Woodie
“Those scales sure are nifty.”
–Maxwell
“The contents are currently incombustible.”
–Wagstaff
“This chest is wörthy öf my weapöns.”
–Wigfrid
“It looks like my old toy chest!”
–Webber
“What did I get?!”
–Walani
“Ooh la la, burnproof storage.”
–Warly
“'Tis keepin me treasures safe n'sound.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA STUFF NAUGHT FWOOSH HENCE”
–Wilba
“Fire Safe”
–Wormwood
“Who doesn't need a fireproof chest?”
–Wheeler
“For the snootiest of snoots.”
–Winona
“Chest to impress.”
–Wortox
“Like look of this box, florpt.”
–Wurt
“We'll have to find something worthy of going in there.”
–Walter
“Now that I'm not worried about my things burning up, I can worry about everything else.”
–Wanda
The Scaled Chest is a craftable container in the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype, and costs 1 Scale, 4 Boards, and 10 Gold Nuggets to craft. Unlike the regular Chest, the Scaled Chest is fireproof and has 12 slots, as opposed to the normal Chest's 9 slots.

Chests help keep items better organized than by dropping them on the ground. Note that there are four Mobs in the game that can steal from, or knock items out of, chests; Splumonkeys, Krampus, Slurtles, and Bearger.

Tips[edit | edit source]
While Scaled Chests may seem desirable for a hot Summer, due to the risk of spontaneous combustion and the Dragonfly's natural vandalism for Ashes, it is probably best to use Scales to craft Scalemail first, since the Dragonfly becomes much easier to fight after Scalemail is acquired, and in later Summers, the player may have enough gold to mass-produce Scaled Chests.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rương Cân là một vật chứa có thể chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Reign of Giants. Nó yêu cầu Máy luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu và tốn 1 Cân, 4 Ván ép và 10 Vàng Thỏi để chế tạo. Không giống như Rương thông thường, Rương vảy có khả năng chống cháy và có 12 khe, trái ngược với 9 khe của Rương thông thường.
title: Scaled Chest

It requires an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype, and costs 1 [[Scales|Scale]], 4 [[Boards]], and 10 [[Gold Nugget]]s to craft. Unlike the regular [[Chest]], the Scaled Chest is [[fire]]proof and has 12 slots, as opposed to the normal [[Chest]]'s 9 slots. [[Item]]s can be stored in a Scaled Chest by dragging them onto it or by opening the Chest to place them in specific slots. Chests help keep items better organized than by dropping them on the ground. Note that there are four [[Mobs]] in the game that can steal from, or knock items out of, chests; [[Splumonkey]]s, [[Krampus]], [[Slurtle]]s, and [[Bearger]]. == {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content == In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, the Scaled Chest crafting recipe is unavailable, however, a [[Blueprint]] for it can be bought with 200 [[Oinc]]s from [[The Tinkerer's Tower]]. The Scales are available at [['The Sty' Oddities Emporium]]. Additionally, the Scaled Chest can be opened by [[Pog]]s. == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * While Scaled Chests may seem desirable for a hot [[Summer]], due to the risk of spontaneous combustion and the [[Dragonfly]]'s natural vandalism for [[Ashes]], it is probably best to use Scales to craft [[Scalemail]] first, since the Dragonfly becomes much easier to fight after Scalemail is acquired, and in later Summers, the player may have enough gold to mass-produce Scaled Chests. * The same functionality can be achieved with [[Piggyback]]s, with the only drawback being that players have to constantly equip and unequip the Piggybacks to check the items inside of them. == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Scaled Chest In-Game.png|Scaled Chests with [[Wolfgang]] for scale.
